description: Premium selling: perceived value, exclusivity, status, premium pricing psychology

items.name: Perceived Value > Actual Cost (luxury = dream, not spreadsheet)
items.tactic: Price = perception. Rolex = accuracy + brand + status. Sell status, not watch.

items.name: Exclusivity Mechanics (scarcity real o perceived)
items.examples: Only 10 sold annually. Membership-only access. Handcrafted, limited edition.

items.name: Premium Pricing Justification (why $50k not $5k?)
items.framework: Quality + craftsmanship + heritage + exclusivity + lifetime access + VIP support
